name: Integration Foundation
brief: A reusable framework for inbound and outbound integrations in Business Central.
description: Integration Foundation gives Business Central one shared staging record (the Integration Message) and a set of proven integration patterns built on it: type-based dispatch, idempotent duplicate detection, out-of-band swappable error classification, delayed correlated replies, durable staged pipelines, and a first-class manual recovery experience. It is a framework only; consuming apps add a handler or a pipeline stage without editing the framework.
